title: acmella decumbens var. decumbens
intro: Acmella decumbens var. decumbens, also known as toothache plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that has been used for centuries in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it an effective treatment for toothaches, headaches, and other painful conditions. The health benefits of Acmella decumbens var. decumbens include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and protecting against oxidative stress, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for oral health and wellness. Herbal preparations of the toothache plant include teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to make mouthwashes, ointments, and other topical treatments for oral health.
